title: Lifecycle documents
description: The real activities of each phase, written up from the programme's own answers.

steps.title: What this phase consists of
steps.description: The actual activities, not a template.
steps.voiceScript: Each of the sixteen phases has real activities. This lists the ones for the phase the programme is in.
steps.captionText: Each of the sixteen phases has real activities. This lists the ones for the phase the programme is in.
steps.fallbackMessage: What this phase consists of: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Tick what applies
steps.description: You choose what the document covers.
steps.voiceScript: Tick the activities this document should cover.
steps.captionText: Tick the activities this document should cover.
steps.fallbackMessage: Tick what applies: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Answer, or upload a source
steps.description: It is written FROM the programme, not guessed.
steps.voiceScript: Answer the questions, or upload a document it can read. The write-up comes from the programme's own answers -- it is not invented.
steps.captionText: Answer the questions, or upload a document it can read. The write-up comes from the programme's own answers -- it is not invented.
steps.fallbackMessage: Answer, or upload a source: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Generate it
steps.description: Downloadable, and attached to the programme.
steps.voiceScript: Generate it, and it is attached to the programme and downloadable.
steps.captionText: Generate it, and it is attached to the programme and downloadable.
steps.fallbackMessage: Generate it: not visible on this screen yet.
